reason_for_stage: Resolver coverage must classify trace export adapter work as observability tooling, not authority ZIP export, while retaining the generic ZIP export route for real authority export tasks.

sources.claim: Agents SDK traces include LLM generations, tool calls, handoffs, guardrails, custom events, and can use custom trace processors.
Tool guardrails run before and after function tool execution; some hosted/built-in tools and handoffs use separate paths.
OpenTelemetry span semantic conventions standardize attributes for trace/span analysis across systems.
LangGraph/LangSmith observability uses trace/run style monitoring for workflows.
